characters.name: 陳默
characters.description: young Korean man, early 30s, short black hair with slight natural wave, clean-shaven, sharp but gentle eyes, defined jawline, fair skin, wearing minimalist white linen shirt with sleeves rolled up

characters.name: 林澈
characters.description: young Korean man, mid 20s, sharp intense dark eyes with cold gaze, short messy black hair, lean but muscular build, small scar near right eye corner, wearing dark tactical jacket over black shirt
characters.personality: 冷静、精於計算、唔會再信任何人——但內心深處仲有一絲溫柔

characters.name: 沈星河
characters.description: young Korean woman, mid 20s, long flowing silver-white hair, striking purple eyes, elegant and regal bearing, wearing dark blue and silver medieval-inspired dress with subtle armor elements, beautiful but with a cold determined expression, fallen princess aura, korean manhwa style, semi-realistic, soft cel shading, detailed facial features, pinterest aesthetic
characters.personality: 表面冷漠、內心堅韌、有自己嘅復仇

characters.name: 鐵柱
characters.description: tall muscular beastman warrior, late 20s, rough rugged face with sharp canine teeth showing, short spiky brown hair, wolf-like ears on top of head, scarred arms, wearing crude leather armor and fur cloak, big friendly grin, korean manhwa style, semi-realistic, soft cel shading, detailed, pinterest aesthetic
characters.personality: 直率、忠誠、頭腦簡單但重情義

characters.name: 白先生
characters.description: mysterious middle-aged Korean man, early 40s, neatly combed dark hair with silver streaks, sharp intelligent eyes behind thin round glasses, always with a calm enigmatic smile, wearing elegant long dark coat over vest, carrying a cane, scholarly yet dangerous aura, korean manhwa style, semi-realistic, soft cel shading, detailed facial features, pinterest aesthetic
characters.personality: 深不可測、似敵似友、知道穿越嘅秘密

characters.name: 卡爾
characters.description: grizzled veteran warrior, late 50s, one eye with eyepatch over left eye, short grey beard, weathered tough face with deep wrinkles, muscular despite age, wearing worn plate armor with battle scars, wise and fatherly expression, korean manhwa style, semi-realistic, soft cel shading, detailed facial features, pinterest aesthetic
characters.personality: 退役老兵、導師型角色、實力深不可測

characters.name: 周偉明
characters.description: Korean man in his mid-30s, sharp angular face, short black hair with silver streaks at temples, wearing expensive dark suit, cold calculating eyes, corporate villain aura, korean manhwa style, semi-realistic, soft cel shading, detailed facial features
characters.personality: 貪婪、背叛、表面忠誠實則陰險

characters.name: 方詩韻
characters.description: Korean woman in her late 20s, elegant oval face, long straight black hair, wearing sophisticated modern dress, beautiful but deceptive smile, femme fatale aura, korean manhwa style, semi-realistic, soft cel shading, detailed facial features
characters.personality: 美貌與心機並存、表面溫柔實則冷酷

characters.name: 阿標
characters.description: Korean man, early 30s, muscular build, short cropped hair, scar on left cheek, wearing black tactical vest, intimidating expression, bodyguard/mercenary aura

characters.name: 陳教授
characters.description: Korean man in his late 50s, grey hair neatly combed back, glasses, wearing white lab coat over dress shirt, scholarly but sinister expression, university professor aura, korean manhwa style, semi-realistic, soft cel shading, detailed facial features

characters.name: 黑影人
characters.description: mysterious hooded figure, gender ambiguous, face mostly in shadow with only glowing red eyes visible, wearing dark cloak, ominous presence, dark energy aura, korean manhwa style, semi-realistic, mysterious atmosphere
characters.personality: 最終黑手、神秘、一切嘅源頭
